name_pattern: # Defaults for "Ratio g / unité produit" used to auto-fill unit_multiplier
# when an ingredient is linked to an Agribalyse food.
#   name_pattern   : ILIKE pattern (case-insensitive) matched against agribalyse_foods.name
#   unit           : one of g, kg, ml, L, pièce
# Sources: ANSES Ciqual portion data, INCA3 reference portions, standard culinary
# weights (egg ~60g, apple ~150g, milk density 1.03, oil ~0.92, etc.).
# Lines starting with # are ignored. The first matching pattern wins per (food, unit).
